languages.text: "Или они ее скрывают..." {n}Соломон окидывает присутствующих скептическим взглядом.{/n} "Хотя вряд ли. Слишком сложно для такого сброда".

traits.locale_text: "Или они ее скрывают..." {n}Соломон окидывает присутствующих скептическим взглядом.{/n} "Хотя вряд ли. Слишком сложно для такого сброда".
traits.speaker: SolomorneCompanion

languages.text: "Or they are hiding it..." {n}Solomorne surveys those present with a sceptical eye.{/n} "Unlikely, though. That would require far too much subtlety for such rabble."
languages.original_text: "Или они ее скрывают..." {n}Соломон окидывает присутствующих скептическим взглядом.{/n} "Хотя вряд ли. Слишком сложно для такого сброда".

traits.locale_text: "Or they are hiding it..." {n}Solomorne surveys those present with a sceptical eye.{/n} "Unlikely, though. That would require far too much subtlety for such a rabble."

"Or they are hiding it..." {n}Solomorne surveys those present with a sceptical eye.{/n} "Unlikely, though. That would require far too much subtlety for such rabble."

languages.text: «O tal vez estén escondiendo algo...». {n}Solomorne estudia a los presentes con una mirada escéptica.{/n} «Es poco probable. Requeriría demasiada sutileza para estos patanes».
languages.original_text: "Or they are hiding it..." {n}Solomorne surveys those present with a sceptical eye.{/n} "Unlikely, though. That would require far too much subtlety for such rabble."

traits.locale_text: «O tal vez estén escondiendo algo...». {n}Solomorne estudia a los presentes con una mirada escéptica.{/n} «Es poco probable. Requeriría demasiada sutileza para estos patanes».

languages.text: “又或者，他们是在刻意隐瞒……”{n}索罗蒙用怀疑的目光审视着在场众人。{/n}“但不太可能。这等乌合之众，要耍弄这般细腻的心计，还差得太远。”
languages.original_text: "Or they are hiding it..." {n}Solomorne surveys those present with a sceptical eye.{/n} "Unlikely, though. That would require far too much subtlety for such rabble."

traits.locale_text: “又或者，他们是在刻意隐瞒……”{n}索罗蒙用怀疑的目光审视着在场众人。{/n}“但不太可能。这等乌合之众，要耍弄这般细腻的心计，还差得太远。”

languages.text: « Ou alors, ils les cachent... {n}dit Solomorne observe l'assistance d'un œil sceptique.{/n} C'est peu probable, cependant. Cela nécessiterait bien plus de finesse que n'en sont capables ces gueux. »
languages.original_text: "Or they are hiding it..." {n}Solomorne surveys those present with a sceptical eye.{/n} "Unlikely, though. That would require far too much subtlety for such rabble."

traits.locale_text: « Ou alors, ils les cachent... {n}dit Solomorne observe l'assistance d'un œil sceptique.{/n} C'est peu probable, cependant. Cela nécessiterait bien plus de finesse que n'en sont capables ces gueux. »

languages.text: "Ya da saklıyorlar..." {n}Solomorne, orada bulunanları şüpheci bir gözle süzüyor.{/n} "Pek olası değil gerçi. Böyle bir ayaktakımı için çok fazla incelik gerektirirdi."
languages.original_text: "Or they are hiding it..." {n}Solomorne surveys those present with a sceptical eye.{/n} "Unlikely, though. That would require far too much subtlety for such rabble."

traits.locale_text: "Ya da saklıyorlar..." {n}Solomorne, orada bulunanları şüpheci bir gözle süzüyor.{/n} "Pek olası değil gerçi. Böyle bir ayaktakımı için çok fazla incelik gerektirirdi."

languages.text: "Oder sie verstecken es ..." {n}Solomorne mustert die Anwesenden skeptisch.{/n} "Na ja, unwahrscheinlich. Das würde deutlich mehr Subtilität von diesem Gesindel erfordern."
languages.original_text: "Or they are hiding it..." {n}Solomorne surveys those present with a sceptical eye.{/n} "Unlikely, though. That would require far too much subtlety for such rabble."

traits.locale_text: "Oder sie verstecken es ..." {n}Solomorne mustert die Anwesenden skeptisch.{/n} "Na ja, unwahrscheinlich. Das würde deutlich mehr Subtilität von diesem Gesindel erfordern."

languages.text: 「それとも隠しているのかもしれない…」{n}ソロモーンは疑いの目を向けながら、場に集まった者たちを眺める。{/n}「しかし、それは考えにくい。そんな烏合の衆に、そんな繊細さが必要だとは考えにくい」
languages.original_text: "Or they are hiding it..." {n}Solomorne surveys those present with a sceptical eye.{/n} "Unlikely, though. That would require far too much subtlety for such rabble."

traits.locale_text: 「それとも隠しているのかもしれない…」{n}ソロモーンは疑いの目を向けながら、場に集まった者たちを眺める。{/n}「しかし、それは考えにくい。そんな烏合の衆に、そんな繊細さが必要だとは考えにくい」
